info.title: Suno Music Generation
info.description: API reference for Suno Music Generation on Ace Data Cloud.

data.lyric:
[Verse]
Snowflakes falling like whispered dreams
Frosty windows
Cocoa steam
Candles flicker
Hearts aglow
The quiet hum of winter’s show
[Chorus]
Oh the world feels soft tonight
Wrapped in stars and silver light
Christmas whispers
Hold it tight
Snowfall serenade
[Verse 2]
Footprints weaving through the white
Every step feels just so right
Laughter echoes
Fires burn
Every corner a joy to turn
[Prechorus]
Holly hangs and bells will ring
Magic hums in everything
[Chorus]
Oh the world feels soft tonight
Wrapped in stars and silver light
Christmas whispers
Hold it tight
Snowfall serenade
[Bridge]
Stockings hung with quiet care
Dreams and wishes fill the air
A moment frozen
Time stands still
Hearts align
They always will
data.style: uplifting, orchestral with sleigh bells and warm strings
data.title: Snowfall Serenade

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server. If not specified, the default format is `application/json`. If `application/x-ndjson` is specified, the response will be in newline-delimited JSON format, streaming the response chunk by chunk

lyric.description: The lyric which used to generate the music audio

model.description: The model used to generate the music audio, default is chirp-v4

style.description: The style of the music audio

variation_category.description: variation_category is only supported in versions v5 and above, and there are only three values: high normal subtle.

title.description: The title of the music audio

action.description: The action to generate the music audio. If `generate`, the audio will be generated from the prompt, if `extend`, the audio will be generated continued from existing audio. If `concat`, the audio will be generated concatenated from existing audio. If `cover`, The style of the music will be copied. If `upload_extend`, This custom music will be uploaded to the official and get an audio. If `artist_consistency`, The song will be written in a custom singer style.

custom.description: The flag indicates the music audio is custom or not, if true, the audio will be generated from the lyric, otherwise, the audio will be generated from the prompt

prompt.description: The prompt which used to generate the music audio and the prompt must be less than or equal 200

lyric_prompt.description: The prompt which used for auto generating the lyric, only available when custom is true and the lyric is empty

audio_id.description: The audio id which used to generate the music audio continued from existing audio. If the action is `extend` or `concat`, the audio id is required

mashup_audio_ids.description: The audio ids which used to generate the music audio by mashup. If the action is `mashup`, the audio ids is required.

weirdness.description: Advanced parameters in the official custom mode can only be used in the custom mode.

persona_id.description: Generate songs based on the unique characteristics of the singer's style.

overpainting_start.description: The default start time for adding vocals to the uploaded music is 0.

overpainting_end.description: The end time for adding vocals to the uploaded song must be less than the total duration of the song.

samples_start.description: The default start time for adding samples to the uploaded music is 0.

samples_end.description: The end time for adding samples to the uploaded song must be less than the total duration of the song.

underpainting_start.description: The default starting time for adding accompaniment to the uploaded song is 0.

underpainting_end.description: The end time for adding accompaniment to the uploaded song must be less than the total duration of the song.

continue_at.description: The time in seconds to continue the existing audio. For example, 213.5 means continue at 3 minutes and 33.5 seconds.

callback_url.description: The callback URL which will be called when the music audio is generated

instrumental.description: No lyrics option, default is false, when it is true will ignore the lyric input above.

vocal_gender.description: The gender of the vocal, can be 'm', 'f'

style_negative.description: The style which user do not want to generate the music audio with

style_influence.description: Advanced parameters in the official custom mode can only be used in the custom mode.

audio_weight.description: The official advanced parameters can only be used in the task of covering audios.

replace_section_end.description: This value specifies the start time of the song fragment when the action is replace_section.

replace_section_start.description: This value specifies the start time of the song fragment when the action is replace_section.

success.description: The flag indicates the request is successful or not

parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server. If not specified, the default format is `application/json`. If `application/x-ndjson` is specified, the response will be in newline-delimited JSON format, streaming the response chunk by chunk

name.description: The name of the singer's style.

audio_id.description: Need to upload the generated song id.

vox_audio_id.description: The audio id which used to generate the new singer's style.

vocal_start.description: The start time of the vocal in the audio.

vocal_end.description: The end time of the vocal in the audio.

parameters.description: Maximum number of personas to return.

200.description: OK, returns the list of personas.

is_public.description: Whether the voice persona is public. Voice personas created from uploaded audio are always private.

task_id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server. If not specified, the default format is `application/json`. If `application/x-ndjson` is specified, the response will be in newline-delimited JSON format, streaming the response chunk by chunk

audio_url.description: The publicly accessible URL of the audio file to create a voice from. Must be MP3 or WAV format, at least 10 seconds long, containing clear vocals from a single speaker without background noise or music.

name.description: The name for the custom voice persona.

description.description: A description of the custom voice persona.

prompt.description: Style prompt words that need to be optimized.

data.text:
[Verse]
Snow is falling, all around
Children playing, having fun
It's the season, filled with cheer
Can you feel the magic near? (ooh-yeah)

[Verse 2]
Lights are twinkling, on the tree
Fireplace crackling, warmth and glee
Love is shared, with friends and kin
Let the celebrations begin! (oh-oh-oh)

[Chorus]
Dashing through the snow (hey)
In a one-horse open sleigh
Over fields we go (go)
Laughing all the way (ha haha)
Bells on bobtail ring (ring)
Making spirits bright (bright)
What fun it is to ride and sing
A sleighing song tonight! (yeah-yeah)

model.description: The model used to generate the music lyrics, The default is default.

prompt.description: The prompt which used to generate the music audio

data.text:
Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

你在站里频频回头  
我在站外舍不得走  
有一种不祥的感受  
今天的离别像分手  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

你消失在人群之中  
就像被风吹散的梦  
广州南站人潮汹涌  
有谁在乎我的心痛  

我像个广州的孤儿  
我像个多余的孤儿  
我像个无助的孤儿  
如今又是独自一人  

一路平安我爱的人  
一路珍重我爱的人  
一路平安离去的人  
一路珍重远去的人  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  
Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  

坐在二号线地铁里  
忽然感觉有些委屈  
永泰站外飘着细雨  
有谁在乎我的哭泣  

在注定失眠的夜里  
不知如何安慰自己  
举杯敬自己和过去  
今天终将成为回忆  

Sambuy come back  
Bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn  
Sambuy come back  
Sambuy come back  

我像个广州的孤儿  
我像个被弃的孤儿  
我像个漂泊的孤儿  
如今仍是独自一人  

一生平安我爱的人  
一生珍重我爱的人  
一生平安离去的人  
一生珍重远去的人  

啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
Sambuy come back  
Sambuy come back  

啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦  
我像个广州的孤儿  
Sambuy come back bluespawn greenspawn are making you a spawn
